## Summary

Describe the package or documentation change and why it is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] Cask and formula files pass Ruby syntax checks.
- [ ] `brew style Casks/barkeep.rb Formula/barkeep-cli.rb`
- [ ] Release and source hashes were calculated from public GitHub artifacts.
- [ ] Install or upgrade behavior was tested when package metadata changed.
- [ ] No passwords, tokens, signing credentials, or private keys are included.
